prose:
**Fukui reactivity analysis of phenol** using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in gas phase, neutral singlet state. Geometry: single-point on the supplied input structure (not re-optimized). Partial charges computed via Mulliken population analysis in PySCF. Fukui functions (f⁺, f⁻, Δf) derived from differences in Mulliken charges between N+1 (doublet cation), N (singlet), and N−1 (doublet anion) electron states. **Most electrophilic site:** Atom 3 (ortho-carbon), f⁺ = 2.103. **Most nucleophilic site:** Atom 1 (oxygen), f⁻ = 0.162. SCF converged; charge-conservation checks passed (sum f⁺ = sum f⁻ = 1.0). Calculation run via chemkit CLI: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz`. Plot output: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/argo_claude-haiku-4.5/20260702-225210_phenol_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`.</prose>
<parameter name="n_atoms">13
